description.1: No acceptance criteria; impossible to judge completion
description.2: Vague description; significant differences in individual understanding
description.3: Criteria exist but with uncovered boundary scenarios
description.4: Clear criteria; consistent understanding across all parties
description.5: Clear criteria; verified as executable through rehearsals or pre-acceptance

description.2: Owner assigned but responsibility boundaries are vague
description.3: Owner clear, but cross-team parts are not clarified
description.4: Both owner and responsibility boundaries are clear
description.5: Owner clear; confirmed in person and recorded

description.1: Not updated for over 30 days while project is ongoing
description.5: Updated within 3 days; consistent with current project status

description.1: Only principle-based expressions; no operational steps

description.4: Steps, trigger conditions, and owners are all clear
description.5: Complete and verified through actual execution in the project

description.2: Exceptions mentioned but no handling path provided
description.3: Covers common exceptions; extreme cases missing
description.4: Covers major exceptions, including escalation paths
description.5: Full scenario coverage, including rollback plans and escalation contacts

description.1: Known conflicts exist and are unhandled
description.5: No conflicts; confirmed with records and periodic reviews

description.1: Definition missing or extremely vague; varying understanding among team members

description.4: Both definition and boundaries are clear
description.5: Definition, boundaries, and examples are all complete; team is aligned

description.1: Team members use different understandings and not recorded
